locations.name: Tower of London
locations.address: St Katharine's & Wapping, London EC3N 4AB, United Kingdom
locations.additionalInfo: The Tower of London, officially Her Majesty's Royal Palace and Fortress of the Tower of London, is a historic castle and fortress located on the north bank of the River Thames in central London.

locations.name: Westminster Abbey
locations.address: 20 Deans Yd, Westminster, London SW1P 3PA, United Kingdom
locations.additionalInfo: Westminster Abbey, formally titled the Collegiate Church of Saint Peter at Westminster, is a historic, mainly Gothic abbey church in the City of Westminster, London, England.

locations.name: British Museum
locations.address: Great Russell St, Bloomsbury, London WC1B 3DG, United Kingdom
locations.additionalInfo: The British Museum is a public museum dedicated to human history, art, and culture. Its permanent collection of eight million works is among the largest and most comprehensive in existence.

locations.name: Natural History Museum
locations.address: Cromwell Rd, South Kensington, London SW7 5BD, United Kingdom
locations.additionalInfo: The Natural History Museum in London is a natural history museum that exhibits a vast range of specimens from various segments of natural history.

locations.name: Hyde Park
locations.address: Hyde Park, London W2 2UH, United Kingdom
locations.additionalInfo: Hyde Park is a Grade I-listed major park in Central London. It is the largest of four Royal Parks that form a chain from the entrance of Kensington Palace through Kensington Gardens and Hyde Park.

locations.name: Regent's Park
locations.address: Chester Rd, London NW1 4NR, United Kingdom
locations.additionalInfo: The Regent's Park is one of London's eight Royal Parks and covers an area of 395 acres. It includes stunning rose gardens with more than 12,000 roses of 400 varieties.

locations.name: HOSI Linz
locations.additionalInfo:
Seit mehr als 40 Jahren ist die HOSI Linz die Interessensvertretung für queere* Menschen in Oberösterreich. Mehr noch: Sie ist Anlaufstelle bei sozialen, rechtlichen und medizinischen Problemen, Sprachrohr für die Anliegen der queeren* Community in Ober­österreich und Ansprechpartnerin für Politik, Medien und Gesellschaft.

🏳️‍🌈 Die queere Menschenrechtsbewegung in OÖ https://www.instagram.com/hosilinz/ 🏳️‍⚧️ Organisator*in @linzpride 🏳️‍🌈 Lokalbetreiber*in @fortynine_linz, Home of @kiki.hosilinz
